Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8005 "ZOOM-0400-8005" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zoom!.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to call the subroutine at $C49D from the original game code before jumping to the entry point which initialises some memory. This allows the game to run correctly on a PAL C64.
